text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp has finally come to an end...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this year's camp went by faster than the blink of an eye!
choice_data_list: You really made the most of your time here.
You really made the most of your time here.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But we still got a lot to do before the Tokyo
Daishoten. It's time to pump things up the
moment we get back at the academy!
